strategies.name: Key Blocklist
strategies.approach: Skip __proto__, constructor, and prototype keys before any recursive merge or assignment occurs.

strategies.name: Null Prototype Base
strategies.approach: Rewrite merge targets to use Object.create(null) so recursive merges never inherit a prototype chain.

strategies.name: hasOwnProperty Guard
strategies.approach: Gate recursion through own-property checks so inherited constructor/prototype traversal cannot continue.

reasoning: Highest combined score. It is the smallest change, fully blocks the prototype pollution vectors, matches the existing function-based style, and carries the lowest regression risk.
